# Build Journal -- 2026-02-10 Session 2

## ML Pipeline Built and Tested (8/8 pass)

### ml/ modules (9 files) -- all generated by `scripts/build_ml_pipeline.py`
- `ml/__init__.py` -- package init with data flow docstring
- `ml/features.py` -- 14 features per trade at entry bar (stochs, ATR%, clouds, volume, temporal)
- `ml/triple_barrier.py` -- label trades {+1 TP, -1 SL, 0 other} from exit_reason
- `ml/purged_cv.py` -- purged K-fold splits (De Prado Ch 7), embargo buffer
- `ml/meta_label.py` -- XGBoost classifier, train/predict_proba/feature_importance
- `ml/shap_analyzer.py` -- TreeExplainer SHAP values, per-trade and global importance
- `ml/bet_sizing.py` -- binary, linear, Kelly criterion sizing from probabilities
- `ml/walk_forward.py` -- rolling IS/OOS windows, WFE rating (ROBUST/MARGINAL/OVERFIT)
- `ml/loser_analysis.py` -- Sweeney W/A/B/C/D classification, BE trigger optimization, ETD

### Column Name Bug Found and Fixed
- `ml/features.py` referenced `stoch_9_3_k`, `stoch_14_3_k`, `stoch_40_3_k`, `stoch_60_10_k`
- Real column names from `signals/stochastics.py`: `stoch_9`, `stoch_14`, `stoch_40`, `stoch_60`
- Fixed by `scripts/fix_ml_features.py` (patch-only, find/replace + verify)

### Test Results (RIVERUSDT 5m, BE$4)
```
[1/8] ml.features...        PASS -- 1278 trades x 18 features
[2/8] ml.triple_barrier...  PASS -- TP:195 SL:1081 Other:2
[3/8] ml.purged_cv...       PASS -- 5 folds, purged: [2, 3, 1, 1, 1]
[4/8] ml.meta_label...      PASS -- 1278 samples, acc=0.914, pos_rate=0.153
[5/8] ml.shap_analyzer...   PASS -- top features: [duration_bars, stoch_60, stoch_9]
[6/8] ml.bet_sizing...      PASS -- taken:85 skipped:1193 avg_size:1.000
[7/8] ml.walk_forward...    PASS -- 9 windows generated
[8/8] ml.loser_analysis...  PASS -- 4 classes, 50 BE levels
```

### Loser Distribution (RIVERUSDT 5m)
- W: 196 trades (15.3%), avg $210.53
- A: 157 trades (12.3%), avg -$150.89
- C: 1 trade (0.1%), avg -$231.13
- D: 924 trades (72.3%), avg -$13.60
- No B losers -- everything either clean loss or catastrophic reversal

---

## 4 Scripts Written

### 1. `scripts/fix_ml_features.py`
- Patches wrong column names in ml/features.py
- Creates data/output/ml/ directory
- Verifies fix with synthetic data
- Run: `python scripts/fix_ml_features.py`

### 2. `scripts/test_ml_pipeline.py`
- Tests all 8 ml/ modules end-to-end with real cached data (RIVERUSDT)
- Falls back to synthetic data if no cache
- Run: `python scripts/test_ml_pipeline.py`

### 3. `scripts/run_ml_analysis.py`
- Full ML analysis pipeline on any single coin
- Backtest -> features -> labels -> XGBoost -> SHAP -> bet sizing -> loser analysis -> walk-forward
- CLI args for all parameters (--symbol, --timeframe, --be-raise, --threshold, --save, --save-db)
- Run: `python scripts/run_ml_analysis.py --symbol RIVERUSDT --timeframe 5m --be-raise 4 --save`

### 4. `scripts/sweep_all_coins_ml.py`
- Sweeps all cached coins through ML pipeline
- Ranks by expectancy, filtered expectancy, WFE
- Loser class distribution per coin
- Saves to data/output/ml/sweep_ml_5m.csv
- Run: `python scripts/sweep_all_coins_ml.py --timeframe 5m --be-raise 2`

### Security Review -- All 4 Scripts
- No command injection, no eval/exec, no pickle
- No hardcoded credentials (DB creds in .env via db.py)
- No outbound network calls (reads local parquet cache)
- Parameterized SQL in db.py
- All paths derived from __file__, no user-controlled path components

---

## Dashboard Exists (scripts/dashboard.py)

Full Streamlit dashboard with:
- All strategy parameters in sidebar (stochastics, clouds, signal logic, exits, AVWAP, BE, position, commission)
- Single coin view: KPIs, equity curve, MFE/MAE scatter, P&L histogram, grade breakdown, BE/AVWAP comparison
- Batch sweep: all cached coins ranked by expectancy
- Param logging to data/output/param_log.jsonl

### Missing: ML tabs not wired in yet
Plan approved to add 5-tab layout:
1. Overview (existing content)
2. Trade Analysis (existing content reorganized)
3. MFE/MAE & Losers (ml.loser_analysis)
4. ML Meta-Label (ml.features, triple_barrier, meta_label, shap, bet_sizing)
5. Validation (ml.purged_cv, walk_forward)

## PowerShell Note
PowerShell uses `;` not `&&` for command chaining:
```
cd "C:\Users\User\Documents\Obsidian Vault\PROJECTS\four-pillars-backtester"; streamlit run scripts/dashboard.py
```
